en.extract:
The purple-breasted sunbird (Nectarinia purpureiventris) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae.
It is native to the Albertine Rift montane forests.

The '''purple-breasted sunbird''' ('''''Nectarinia purpureiventris''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Nectariniidae]].
It is native to the [[Albertine Rift montane forests]].
